title: capsicum annuum subsp. baccatum
intro: Capsicum annuum subsp. baccatum, also known as the Bolivian pepper or Rocoto pepper, is a subspecies of the Capsicum annuum plant, a species of the nightshade family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Capsicum annuum subsp. baccatum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a capsule or tincture, or added to teas and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
